name: Booking Field Format Diff Impact Analysis
description: Deep analysis of PROD vs QA DynamoDB field format differences found in booking REQUEST and CONFIRM records after AWS SDK v2 upgrade. Tracing each gap to pre-upgrade and post-upgrade code.

entries.summary: Completed deep impact analysis of PROD vs QA DynamoDB field format diffs. All 7 gaps traced to SDK v1 vs Jackson serialization behavior differences. No functional regressions found. Document written to booking/docs/2026-08-08-booking-field-format-diff-impact.md
entries.detail: Key findings: (1) partyId/partyScac missing = SDK v1 didn't respect @JsonIgnore, (2) splitCopy missing = pre-upgrade annotation placement bug fixed, (3) Boolean N→BOOL = SDK type difference, both readable by both SDKs, (4) notificationParties missing = SDK v1 didn't respect @JsonInclude(NON_EMPTY), (5) null expansion = Jackson writes nulls, SDK v1 skipped them. All traced with code citations.
